note: Added 11 new tests to ExceptionMappingTests.cs: catch hierarchy tests (CatchWgException_CatchesAllSubtypes for all 5 subtypes), sibling isolation test (CatchSpecificSubtype_DoesNotCatchSiblings), and unknown error code tests (UnknownErrorCode_ProducesGenericWgException_WithRawCode for 5 unmapped codes). All 64 tests pass.
